name: Farzi Mushaira
overview:
Zakir Khan is back with his shayarana andaaz , but this time he is not alone!

He has brought his friends along with him and the shayaris will be brutal, heart breaking, hard hitting and above all FARZI like anything.  In each episode five heart broken farzi shayars will come and put their heart out in the shayaris which they will present, from having a crush on your best friend’s sister to discovering strange habits of your girlfriend’s dad. From being labelled as gold diggers to the Journey of Self Rejections!

Along with the Shayari’s the banter between the lineup will, instead of healing the wounds of the heart, rub salt in it!

trailers.title: @Zakir Khan's Farzi Mushaira | Watch Now on Amazon miniTV for FREE
